basic.name: Navneet Gunda
basic.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
basic.bio:
DevOps Engineer with hands-on expertise in building scalable CI/CD pipelines, cloud infrastructure, and release automation. I specialize in streamlining software delivery using Azure DevOps, GitHub, and Microsoft Azure to ensure fast, reliable, and efficient deployments.
I have experience modernizing legacy pipelines, integrating automated QA testing, and managing multi-environment releases with high stability. My focus is on reducing manual effort, improving deployment success rates, and enabling continuous delivery at scale.
I also leverage AI tools to design and deploy AI agents that enhance automation and operational efficiency, bringing intelligent workflows into DevOps practices.
Driven by a continuous improvement mindset, I work at the intersection of development, QA, and operations to deliver resilient and high-performing systems.

experience.title: Senior DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Leading DevOps practices for supply chain planning platform. Architecting and managing Azure cloud infrastructure, designing CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions, implementing containerization with Docker & Kubernetes, and driving AI/MLOps evolution across the platform.
highlights: Architected multi-region Azure infrastructure serving 100+ enterprise clients
Reduced deployment time by 60% through automated CI/CD pipelines
Implemented GitOps workflows with ArgoCD for Kubernetes deployments
Led cloud cost optimization initiatives saving 35% monthly Azure spend

experience.title: DevOps Engineer
experience.description: Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines, managed cloud infrastructure on Azure, and automated deployment workflows for enterprise clients. Collaborated with development teams to implement DevOps best practices.
highlights: Designed and implemented automated CI/CD pipelines for 10+ projects
Managed Azure infrastructure including VMs, AKS, and networking
Implemented infrastructure as code using Terraform and Ansible
Reduced manual deployment effort by 80% through automation

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Engineer Associate

projects.title: Adaptive Traffic Signal Control System
projects.description: Developed an intelligent traffic management system using machine learning algorithms to dynamically adjust signal timings based on real-time traffic density, reducing average wait times significantly.

projects.title: Rural Water Supply Scheme
projects.description: Designed and implemented an automated monitoring system for rural water supply infrastructure, enabling remote tracking of pump performance, water levels, and distribution efficiency.

projects.title: DevOps Pipeline Automation Framework
projects.description: Built a reusable CI/CD pipeline framework using GitHub Actions and Azure DevOps for containerized microservices, including automated testing, security scanning, and multi-environment deployments.
